380	// Helper to execute command for contract testing
381	func executeContractCommand(root *cobra.Command, args ...string) (output string, err error) {
382		buf := new(bytes.Buffer)
383		root.SetOut(buf)
384		root.SetErr(buf)
385		root.SetArgs(args)
386	
387		err = root.Execute()
388		return buf.String(), err
389	}

503	  commands:
504	    git-config-health:
505	      name: "Git config health"

507	      fail_text: "Local Git config is invalid. Repair core.bare/core.worktree/core.hooksPath and fixture identity before pushing."
508	      tags: [policy]
509	
510	    # AGENTS.md §Merge Policy: branches carrying execute-bead / [ddx-*]
511	    # commits must preserve SHA history. closing_commit_sha pointers in
512	    # .ddx/beads.jsonl index those exact commits; squash/rebase/amend that
513	    # rewrites them destroys the output = bead(input) guarantee.
514	    # This guard rejects a push if the local branch contains execute-bead
515	    # or [ddx-*] tagged commits AND the remote already has a different
516	    # history for them (i.e. a force-push rewrite is in flight).
517	    merge-policy:
518	      name: "Preserve execute-bead history"
519	      run: |
520	        # {1} = remote name (origin); {2} = remote URL
521	        remote="${1:-origin}"
522	        # Gather the commits being pushed. lefthook sets {push_files}
523	        # for file pushes; for commit-level inspection we use git range.
524	        # Find the remote-tracking branch HEAD to compute what's new.
525	        local_ref="$(git symbolic-ref -q HEAD 2>/dev/null)"
526	        [ -z "$local_ref" ] && exit 0
527	        remote_ref="refs/remotes/$remote/${local_ref#refs/heads/}"
528	        if ! git rev-parse --verify "$remote_ref" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
529	          # No remote tracking yet — first push, nothing to rewrite.
530	          exit 0
531	        fi
532	        # Commits local has that remote does not (being pushed).
533	        new_commits="$(git log --format='%H %s' "$remote_ref"..HEAD 2>/dev/null)"
534	        [ -z "$new_commits" ] && exit 0
535	        # Commits remote has that local dropped (rewritten or pruned).
536	        dropped="$(git log --format='%H %s' HEAD.."$remote_ref" 2>/dev/null)"
537	        [ -z "$dropped" ] && exit 0
538	        # Check for execute-bead / [ddx-*] markers in dropped commits.
539	        pattern='execute-bead|\[ddx-[0-9a-f]{8,}\]'
540	        if printf '%s\n' "$dropped" | grep -qE "$pattern"; then
541	          echo "ERROR: push would drop commits with execute-bead / [ddx-*] markers:"
542	          printf '%s\n' "$dropped" | grep -E "$pattern" | head
543	          echo ""
544	          echo "AGENTS.md §Merge Policy forbids rewriting these SHAs because"
545	          echo ".ddx/beads.jsonl closing_commit_sha points at them."
546	          echo "Use --ff-only or --no-ff; do not squash, rebase, or amend."
547	          exit 1
548	        fi
549	        exit 0

any future commit introducing NewCommandFactory("/tmp") in cli/cmd/*_test.go.

)" 2>&1
